Social niceties or 'soft' deadlines do not justify sacrificing my future performance.

goals.rationale: I will not let the smell derail my immediate deadline submission. My assertive style demands I handle this verbally when I have bandwidth, but right now my energy is locked into the academic sprint. I am deferring the confrontation until after the submission so I don't lose momentum, using the meal time tomorrow as the tactical moment to set strict terms rather than begging for cooperation.
